top_signals.title: China Cracks Down on Illegal Cross-Border Securities Trading
top_signals.summary: China is launching a sweeping campaign against illicit cross-border securities, futures and fund trading, in an unprecedented crackdown that aims to stamp out such activities within two years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
